---
title: Example Epic
epic-id: A1-example-epic
initiative: example-research
gantt-id: A1
gantt-dates:
- '2026-06-01'
- '2026-07-15'
status: open
owner: TODO Owner
customer: TODO — who this epic serves
need: TODO — the problem being solved
benefit: TODO — the payoff when it closes
thesis-chapters: []
related-epics: []
---

## Background

> TODO — why this epic exists; reference parent/sibling epics and the
> route being taken.

## Status log

<!-- Dated bullets, newest first, each linking its weekly update:
- **W<N> (YYYY-MM-DD):** what moved this week.
  → [WU-YYYY-MM-DD week N](../../../../updates/WU-YYYY-MM-DD-week-NN/index.html)
     Done epics add a `## Resolution` section above the listing. -->

{{< include _listing.md >}}

{{< include _revisions.md >}}
